_instructions: One file per word. Each sense must have exactly ONE POS. If a word has multiple POS roles (e.g., Vi and N), create SEPARATE senses. Fields prefixed with _ are documentation -- strip them before import. TOCFL is the authoritative source for POS classification. Editorial corrections are tracked via alignment + source fields.

word._smart_id_format: Unicode codepoints separated by underscores. Single char: u + hex (u6d41 for 流). Multi-char: underscore-separated (u81a8_u8139 for 膨脹, u5ddd_u6d41_u4e0d_u606f for 川流不息).
word._alignment_note: Word-level alignment = worst of its senses. full = all POS match TOCFL. partial = we added editorial senses. disputed = we disagree with a TOCFL POS.

senses._sense_id_format: {smart_id}_{POS}_{sequence} -- for tracking; DB assigns its own IDs.
senses._pinyin_note: Use tone numbers after each syllable (liu2, peng2zhang4). One pronunciation per sense. Neutral tone = no number (de, ma).
_pos_options: V -- Action Verb, Transitive (買, 吃, 編輯 -- subject does something TO a direct object)
Vi -- Action Verb, Intransitive (哭, 坐, 辯論 -- activity with no direct object, no state change)
Vp -- Process Verb, Intransitive (死, 崩潰, 退休 -- subject undergoes state change, no object)
Vpt -- Process Verb, Transitive (完成, 打破, 發現 -- resultative complement + takes object)
Vpsep -- Separable Process Verb (生氣, 結婚 -- CLOSED category, 13 TOCFL words)
Vs -- Stative Verb (昂貴, 安詳, 健康 -- 很-test passes, no object, predicative)
Vsattr -- Stative Verb, Attributive ONLY (大型, 電動 -- 很-test FAILS, CLOSED category)
Vspred -- Stative Verb, Predicative ONLY (夠, 多, 少)
Vssep -- Separable Stative Verb (擔心, 傷心 -- CLOSED category, 7 TOCFL words)
Vst -- State-Transitive Verb (喜歡, 知道, 覺得 -- 在-test fails + takes object/complement)
Vaux -- Auxiliary Verb (能, 可以, 會 -- modal before main verb)
Vsep -- Separable Verb / V-O Compound (辦案, 唱歌, 走路 -- 了/modifier inserts between V and O)
Vcomp -- Resultative Complement (到, 住, 掉, 見, 開, 成, 好, 起 -- character acts as complement in V+C compounds)
CE -- Complement Expression (看得見, 等不及 -- complete V+得/不+Vcomp patterns)
N -- Noun
M -- Measure Word
Adv -- Adverb
Prep -- Preposition
Conj -- Conjunction
Ptc -- Particle
Det -- Determiner
Prn -- Pronoun
Num -- Number
Aux -- Auxiliary
Intj -- Interjection
IE -- Idiomatic Expression
Ph -- Phrase
_pos_critical_rules: V IS a valid sense-level tag -- the default transitive action verb. NOT a grouping label.
Each sense gets exactly ONE POS. If this word is also a Noun, create a separate sense.
Separable (Vsep) is ONLY for V-O compounds (動賓). V-V compounds with resultative complements are Vpt/Vp.
Object omission does NOT equal intransitive. A verb is transitive if it CAN take a direct object.
Vi = intransitive ACTION only. Intransitive change-of-state = Vp, NOT Vi.
Vpt/Vp = process verbs. If a resultative complement morpheme is present, it is Vpt (transitive) or Vp (intransitive). No further testing needed.

_pos_forced_test_order.step_1: Separable? Can you insert 了/過/modifier between V and O in modern speech? YES -> Vsep/Vpsep/Vssep
_pos_forced_test_order.step_2: Resultative complement? Common complements: 成到出上開掉斷破完入清光住見滿合回化取先後染立選敗去失. YES -> Vpt (takes object) or Vp (no object). STOP.
_pos_forced_test_order.step_3: 著-test: V+著+[object] natural? YES -> not process. Continue. NO -> strong evidence for Vp/Vpt.
_pos_forced_test_order.step_4: 在-test: 在+V natural? YES -> non-stative (Action/Process). NO -> Stative (go to step 6).
_pos_forced_test_order.step_5: Threshold crossing? Clear before->after state change? YES -> Vpt (object) or Vp (no object). NO -> V (object) or Vi (no object).
_pos_forced_test_order.step_6: Stative subcategories: Takes object -> Vst. 很-test passes, no object -> Vs. 很-test fails, attributive only -> Vsattr (CLOSED). Predicative only -> Vspred.

_pos_known_traps: 知道/喜歡/覺得 -> Vst (NOT Vpt -- 在-test fails, already IN the state)
明白 -> Vpt (白=complement, 沒明白 confirms unreached result)
離開/抵達 -> V (location verbs -- Chinese takes place as direct object)
安裝 -> V (durative activity, NOT Vpt -- no instantaneous snap)
閉/開 -> V (no complement in base verb; 閉上/開完 = separate Vpt entries)
唱歌/走路/說話 -> Vsep (V-O splits), NOT Vp
打電話 -> Vsep (NOT Vi or Vp)
senses._source_note: tocfl = from TOCFL official wordlist. editorial = added by our team (Louie/Guangliu/Huiming).
senses._alignment_note: full = matches TOCFL. partial = our editorial addition. disputed = we disagree with TOCFL's POS for this sense.
senses._alignment_workflow: When disputing a TOCFL POS: (1) mark the TOCFL sense as 'disputed', (2) create a new editorial sense with our corrected POS marked 'partial'. Both senses stay visible for learners.

definitions.en: to expand; to swell; to inflate

senses._definitions_note: Provide both English and Traditional Chinese. The definition must be specific to THIS sense and THIS POS only. Do NOT include separable notes like '(separable: X+Y)' -- the POS chip already communicates that.
senses._domains_note: Flat array. The FIRST domain is treated as primary. All others are secondary. Domains are lenses -- they describe WHERE the word is used, not WHAT it means.
senses._channel_note: Channel answers: 'Where is this word used?' Describes the spoken vs. written distribution spectrum.
senses._channel_rule: Do NOT use 'fluid' here. 'fluid' belongs in dimension (as dim-fluid). Channel is strictly about usage distribution: spoken vs. written.
senses._dimension_note: Dimension answers: 'What kind of meaning is this?' Multi-select. Describes the pedagogical/semantic character of the word.

_dimension_definitions.internal: Inner life -- emotions, feelings, the unseen, essence. (懊惱, 惋惜, 憧憬)
_dimension_definitions.external: Outer world -- what can be seen, touched, measured. (彎曲, 威風, 旺盛)
_dimension_definitions.abstract: Abstract concepts -- ideas, systems, principles without physical form.
_dimension_definitions.dim-fluid: Meaning shifts across contexts -- semantic center moves depending on usage.
_dimension_definitions.temporal: Time-oriented -- duration, sequence, tense-like. (以前, 從此, 當時)
_dimension_definitions.aspectual: Aspect-marking -- how action unfolds over time. (了, 過, 著)
_dimension_definitions.grammatical: Purely grammatical function. (把, 比, 得)
_dimension_definitions.spatial: Space/location-oriented. (後, 前, 上, 下)
_dimension_definitions.pragmatic: Discourse/function -- structural or communicative. (為, 萬分, 為止)

senses._intensity_note: 1-5 scale. How strong/emphatic is this word? 1 = mild, 5 = extreme. NOT how common it is.
senses._valency_note: 0 = intransitive (Vi, Vp), 1 = transitive (V, Vpt, Vst), 2 = ditransitive. null for non-verbs.
senses._formula_note: Structural pattern showing how the word fits in a sentence. Must be pedagogically useful. Use Chinese where possible.

_formula_notation.brackets: [Verb], [Person], [Clause] -- variable slots the learner fills in. Labels should be grammatically or semantically specific.
_formula_notation.plus: + connects elements in sequence. Spaces around + for readability.
_formula_notation.slash: / separates alternative patterns. Each side is a complete pattern.
_formula_notation.no_brackets: Words without brackets are fixed constants in the pattern.

_formula_by_pos.Vsep: 聊天 / 跟 + [Person] + 聊天 -- MUST show both joined and split forms
_formula_by_pos.Vcomp: V + 住 (記住, 抓住, 擋住)
_formula_by_pos.fixed: 再見 / 對不起 / 不客氣 -- fixed expressions ARE the formula, no brackets needed

_formula_rules: The word MUST appear in its own formula.
Use Chinese in formulas, not English. Slot labels in [] are the only English.
Keep it short -- one or two patterns maximum.
Be specific about object types: [Food] is better than [Object] for 烤.
Do NOT include separable notes like (V-O: 走+路). The POS chip says Vsep.
Do NOT write definitions as formulas. 'to walk' is not a formula.
Formulas are for learners -- prioritize patterns needed to produce correct sentences.
senses.usage_note: Broader and more systemic than 漲. Common with prices, egos, ambitions, and physical objects.
senses.learner_traps: Often confused with 擴大. 膨脹 implies internal pressure or uncontrolled growth; 擴大 implies deliberate expansion.
senses._relations_note: Semantic relations to other words. Use traditional characters. The importer will look up the word_object and sense.

_relation_types.synonym_close: Very close synonym — nearly interchangeable in most contexts
_relation_types.synonym_related: Related synonym — similar meaning but different nuance, register, or scope
_relation_types.contrast: Not opposite, but commonly compared or confused with this word

senses._collocations_note: Common natural word pairings that learners would encounter. Use traditional characters. No tautological collocations.

examples.chinese: 通貨膨脹讓人民的生活越來越困難。
examples.english: Inflation has made people's lives increasingly difficult.

senses._examples_guidance: Provide at least 2 examples per sense. Each example should clearly demonstrate usage within one of the listed domains. Examples should feel natural. The word MUST appear in each example.

_global_rules: 1 sense = 1 POS = 1 definition block. If a word has Vi AND N meanings, create SEPARATE senses.
V IS a valid POS -- the default transitive action verb. Do not avoid it.
TOCFL is the authoritative source for POS classification. Editorial corrections must be tracked via source + alignment.
Use the forced 6-step test order to classify verbs. NEVER skip ahead.
Resultative complement present? -> Vpt/Vp. STOP. No further testing needed.
Vsattr is a SMALL CLOSED category -- only for words that CANNOT appear after 很 as predicates. Check TOCFL list.
Vsep is for V-O compounds (動賓) where V and O can be separated. V-V compounds with complements are Vpt/Vp, NOT Vsep.
Do NOT include separable metadata in definitions (e.g., 'separable: 走+路'). The POS chip communicates this.
Pronouns should use Prn (not N). Numbers should use Num (not N). Our correction over TOCFL's N classification.
sense = meaning; domains = lenses. The definition defines what it means; domains describe where it's used.
The first domain in the array is treated as primary.
Register, dimension, and domains are multi-select (arrays). Other attributes are single-select.
Channel describes spoken/written usage spectrum. Dimension describes semantic character. Do not confuse.
Pinyin uses numeric tones (liu2, not liú). Neutral tone = no number (de, ma, ba).
All _ prefixed fields are documentation and will be stripped on import.

Huiming: Vsep avoidance -- tends to tag V-O compounds as Vp instead of Vsep
Vpt over-application -- some simple action verbs tagged as Vpt without resultative complement
N under-assigned for primary noun senses
Separable notes in definitions -- strip '(separable: X+Y)' from all definitions
Guangliu: Vsattr over-applied to gradable Vs words
Vi treated as 'any intransitive' -- Vi = intransitive ACTION only, not process
Vst missed entirely -- apply 在-test before defaulting to V
Louie: Vst over-applied to active verbs -- 在-test is mandatory
Vi used as default intransitive -- intransitive process = Vp
N assigned to nominalization-only uses -- apply nominalization filter
